revision.comment: These two are historical figures rather than Bodhisattvas
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Bodhisattvas |state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} |title = [[Bodhisattva]]s |listclass = hlist
|basestyle = background-color:#ffd068;
|group1 = [[List of bodhisattvas|Major]] |list1 = * [[Avalokiteśvara|Avalokiteśvara]] ([[Guanyin]]) * [[Manjushri|Mañjuśrī]] * [[Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra]] * [[Kṣitigarbha]] * [[Maitreya]] * [[Mahasthamaprapta|Mahāsthāmaprāpta]] * [[Ākāśagarbha]]
|group2 = [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] |list2 = * [[Skanda (Buddhism)|Skanda]] * [[Guan Yu|Sangharāma (Guān Yǔ)]]
|group3 = [[Vajrayana]] |list3 = * [[Padmasambhava]] * [[Mandāravā]] * [[Tara (Buddhism)|Tārā]] * [[Vajrapani|Vajrapāṇi]] * [[Vajrasattva]] * [[Sitatapatra|Sitātapatrā]] * [[Cundi (Buddhism)|Cundī]]
|group4 = Other |list4 = * [[B. R. Ambedkar]] * [[Bhaiṣajyarāja]] * [[Candraprabha]] * [[Nio (Buddhism)|Niō]] * [[Supratisthitacaritra|Supratiṣṭhitacāritra]] * [[Supushpachandra|Supuṣpacandra]] * [[Sūryaprabha]] * [[Vasudhara|Vasudhārā]] * [[Viśiṣṭacāritra]] * [[Viśuddhacāritra]] * [[Vimalakirti]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Bodhisattvas| ]] {{documentation}} </noinclude>
